item.title: Version 0.5.126
item.description:
What's New in 0.5.126

Version 0.5.126

✨ New Features

  • Add DAW log uploads, anonymization, extractRelevantLines fix, and BUILD_DIAGNOSTICS guard
  • Add PowerShell fallback for GitHub file upload when JUCE HTTP PUT fails
  • Add juce_audio_devices include for AudioDeviceManager in DiagnosticKit
  • Add juce_audio_devices for AudioDeviceManager in DiagnosticKit
  • Add JUCE DiagnosticKit for Windows/Linux
  • Add Check PlunderTube button in Windows Settings panel
  • Add Update-LatestJson to Windows publish flow
  • Add Windows publish flow: version validation, appcast, pt-releases
  • Add WinSparkle auto-update integration for Windows standalone
  • Add ISCC retry loop and Windows Defender exclusion
  • Fix sample dedup failures and add platform-specific help text
  • Fix Windows multi-window rendering: add SharedInitWindow (matching macOS/Linux pattern)
  • Fix build: add public getVisageBridge() accessor to VisagePluginEditor
  • Wire up aria2c for yt-dlp downloads + add mouse event diagnostics
  • Add diagnostic logging for waveform buffer and mouse events on Windows
  • Add MSVC /utf-8 flag to fix Unicode icon rendering on Windows
  • Fix sonicgarbage.py indentation and add audio pipeline tests
  • Add Windows installer infrastructure and fix build name
  • Add MAP file and PDB generation for Windows crash debugging
  • Add module base offset logging to crash handler
  • Add thread ID and stack dump to crash handler
  • Add debug logging to ApplicationWindow::show and showWindow for crash diagnosis
  • Add SEH exception handling around bgfx::frame/renderFrame for crash diagnosis
  • Add unhandled exception filter + minidump for crash diagnosis
  • Add detailed initialise() logging to early_debug.log for crash narrowing
  • Add global constructor logging to prove StandaloneApp.cpp is linked
  • Add timestamp to visage debug log to verify freshness per run
  • Add separate app_debug.log for StandaloneApp crash diagnosis
  • Add Windows debug logging to PluginProcessor constructor and createEditor
  • Add render thread debug logging
  • Add debug logging to StandaloneApp for Windows crash diagnosis
  • Add more debug logging to layer.cpp for crash diagnosis
  • Add debug logging and env-var adapter override for VM crash diagnosis
  • Add WARP software renderer fallback for VM/headless testing
  • Fix Windows runtime: remove WHOLEARCHIVE, add cross-platform Deno URLs
  • Add Windows release strategy plan document
  • Add TimeStretchProcessor and missing Essentia algo dirs for Windows
  • Add KissFFT, exclude macOS-only Accelerate FFT from Essentia build
  • Add 3rdparty sources and include dirs for Essentia Windows build
  • Re-add streaming include dirs for header resolution
  • Add streaming include dirs to Essentia build for MSVC
  • Patch Essentia types.h for MSVC: add std::binary_function shim
  • Fix Essentia build on MSVC: use C++14 and add _HAS_AUTO_PTR_ETC for std::binary_function
  • Add Windows x64 Essentia build support
  • Add CMAKE_POSITION_INDEPENDENT_CODE for Linux VST3 shared library linking
  • Add _USE_MATH_DEFINES and M_PI fallback to all files using M_PI
  • Guard EssentiaTab with #ifdef ENABLE_ESSENTIA_FEATURES in VisageSettingsPanel
  • Add M_PI definition to VisageAnimationManager.cpp for Windows
  • Add windows.h include for HWND type in JuceVisageBridge
  • Add Windows platform guards to CMakeLists.txt

    • 🐛 Bug Fixes

  • Fix em-dash encoding in diagnostic report, capture pluginval crash details
  • Fix inflated word dictionary claim in Windows installer welcome text
  • Fix UpdateCallback static variable across MSVC static library boundary
  • Fix VST3 linker error from ENABLE_WINSPARKLE on shared target
  • Fix installer usermusic error and enable WinSparkle update button in settings
  • Fix pluginval launching in GUI mode instead of headless CLI mode
  • Fix DiagnosticKit exe path - no Standalone subdirectory on Windows
  • Replace em-dash with ASCII dash in build.ps1 to fix Windows parse error
  • Fix PowerShell here-string parse error in DiagnosticKit .env generation
  • Fix JUCE Array::sort lambda to use std::sort for MSVC compatibility
  • Fix OwnedArray copy error: use reference for getAvailableDeviceTypes
  • Fix JUCE_TAG regex to skip commented lines, default to 8.0.12
  • Fix WinSparkleUpdater guard: use _WIN32 instead of JUCE_WINDOWS
  • Fix gh release create: use --notes-file for multiline release notes
  • Fix publish action: gh release view stderr crashes PowerShell
  • Fix Inno Setup template and build.ps1 for working Windows installer
  • Fix double "Save Preset As" dialog on Windows
  • Fix preset dialog hidden behind Visage canvas + click-through
  • Fix ghost preset dialog on Windows after save
  • Fix use-after-free in WaveformEditorWindow delayed callbacks
  • Fix D3D11 multi-window rendering: view ID partitioning + debug cleanup
  • Fix main window freeze after resume: restart watchdog timer
  • Fix empty keyboard window on re-open: restart timer after destroyVisageWindow
  • Fix keyboard window resume: cache bridge pointer for reliable pause/resume
  • Fix VirtualKeyboardWindow bgfx contention on Windows
  • Fix crash on waveform editor close: destroy bgfx framebuffer before resuming main window
  • Fix empty waveform buffer: load audio directly from disk when processBlock hasn't run
  • Fix Visage multi-window rendering on Windows (waveform editor black screen)
  • Fix PYTHON_EXEC delimiter for Windows: use | instead of :
  • Fix cross-platform paths for Windows: use PlunderTubePaths helpers
  • Fix cross-platform paths in sonicgarbage.py and postinstall script
  • Fix Windows crash: skip JUCE OpenGL overlay, use Visage's D3D11 directly
  • Fix duplicate stack variable in crash handler
  • Fix NOMINMAX for windows.h in canvas.cpp
  • Write PluginProcessor debug logs to early_debug.log (not visage which truncates)
  • Fix debug logging: use separate early_debug.log to avoid truncation by renderer
  • Fix: Custom standalone app was macOS-only, causing Windows to use default JUCE app
  • Write all debug logs to visage_debug.log for unified crash trace
  • Fix patch script: don't exit early, check all files
  • Fix unescaped parenthesis in batch file comment
  • Fix patch to target actual struct name: case_insensitive_str_cmp
  • Fix Essentia MSVC patch: remove std::binary_function instead of shimming
  • Fix undeclared homeDir in findScriptFile()
  • Fix PlunderTubePaths.h for cross-platform support
  • Fix Visage D3D11 swap chain crash on Windows VFIO GPU passthrough
  • Update JUCE 8.0.7 → 8.0.12 to fix VBlankDispatcher crash on Parallels
  • Fix SIMD template error with jmax on ARM64 Linux NEON
  • Fix 0LL vs int64_t type mismatch in OriginalEnhancedAlgorithm
  • Fix int64_t-to-var ambiguity in SliceManager on ARM64 Linux
  • Fix var-to-int64_t ambiguous cast in SliceManager on ARM64 Linux
  • Fix int64_t/int64 type mismatch on ARM64 Linux (Clang)
  • Fix int64_t cast ambiguity for Clang on Linux ARM64
  • Fix execinfo.h guard and constexpr lambda default params for Windows
  • Fix HWND includes and kModifierCtrl for Windows MSVC
  • Fix missing include and M_PI for Windows MSVC
  • Fix cxxabi.h include and loadFromEssentiaAnalysis guard for Windows
  • Fix Windows MSVC min/max macro conflicts and unguarded getWaveformState
  • Fix Windows compilation errors: dlfcn.h guard, setBounds override, PopupMenu::show

    • 🔧 Improvements

  • Register update callback in StandaloneApp::initialise() not SparkleInit
  • Platform-specific update tip: general settings on Windows, menu on macOS
  • Bundle WinSparkle.dll in portable zip, update latest.json asset name
    • --- Source: `8ddf7171` on `main` ([view commit](https://github.com/danielraffel/PlunderTube/commit/8ddf71717bfe63d158bc1cb0de1ef6250393e636))

    Build 1186 · 8ddf7171 on main
